This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] event.respondWith() is accepted for a download FetchEvent.
  assert_unreached: unregister and register should not fail: Failed to register a ServiceWorker for scope ('https://web-platform.test:8444/service-workers/service-worker/tentative/resources/') with script ('https://web-platform.test:8444/service-workers/service-worker/tentative/resources/fetch-event-download-worker.js'): A bad HTTP response code (404) was received when fetching the script. Harness: the test ran to completion.
